query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.onboardingStage, u.role, u.subscriptionTier, u.subscriptionStatus FROM users u WHERE u.email LIKE '%zapreviewer%' OR u.email LIKE '%mailinator%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.onboardingStage, u.role, u.subscriptionTier, u.subscriptionStatus FROM users u WHERE u.email LIKE '%zapreviewer%' OR u.email LIKE '%mailinator%' LIMIT 5;
